name: Boxhagener Platz
description: Leafy Friedrichshain square ringed by cafe terraces; weekend markets.

name: Helmholtzplatz
description: Prenzlauer Berg square with playground and sunny benches.

name: Mauerpark
description: Sunday flea market, karaoke, and open lawns on the former Wall strip.

name: Goerlitzer Park
description: Big open Kreuzberg park, popular for picnics.

name: Admiralbruecke
description: Canal bridge where people sit out on warm evenings.

name: Paul-Lincke-Ufer
description: Tree-lined canal bank with cafes along the Landwehrkanal.

name: James-Simon-Park
description: Riverside lawn by the Spree on Museum Island's edge.

name: Tempelhofer Feld
description: Vast former airfield; endless sun, kite-flying and BBQ zones.

name: Volkspark Friedrichshain
description: Hilly park with lawns, fountains and a beer garden.

name: Viktoriapark
description: Kreuzberg hill with a waterfall and a sunny city view.

name: Cafe am Neuen See
description: Lakeside beer garden in the Tiergarten.

name: Klunkerkranich
description: Rooftop bar above a Neukoelln car park; sunset views.

name: Schlachtensee
description: Forest lake with sunny southern banks for swimming.

name: Engelbecken
description: Quiet pond and rose garden with a waterfront cafe.

name: Weinbergspark
description: Sloped lawn in Mitte that catches the afternoon sun.

name: Arkonaplatz
description: Relaxed square with a flea market and cafe terraces.

name: Koernerpark
description: Sunken neo-baroque garden with an orangery cafe in Neukoelln.

name: Oberbaumbruecke
description: Landmark brick bridge over the Spree between Kreuzberg and Friedrichshain.
